title: Gooey Floral Irish Pork Casserole
description: A quick-fix Irish dish featuring minced pork, infused with floral notes and a gooey texture, perfect for a comforting meal. This halal-friendly recipe utilizes sous-vide cooking for a tender and juicy result.
instructions: In a large pan, cook the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
Add the minced pork, dried thyme, and dried rosemary to the pan, cooking until the pork is browned.
Stir in the rose petal jelly and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sous-vide eggs and melted butter.
Add the cooked pork mixture, shredded irish cheddar cheese, and all-purpose flour to the bowl, mixing until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a sous-vide bag and seal.
Cook the mixture in the sous-vide machine for 2 hours.
Remove the bag from the machine and carefully cut it open.
Transfer the casserole to a baking dish and top with additional shredded cheese.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C for 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
